default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly GTM strategy discussion and planning for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exploring unique, high-value swag ideas beyond typical corporate merchandise](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Strategizing to boost workshop registrations through various channels (newsletter, influencers, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Discussing ideal profile for events/community manager: networker, community builder, strategic thinker](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Planning upcoming podcast guests and content creation strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

## Topics

### Innovative Swag Ideas

  - [Moving away from generic corporate merchandise (t-shirts, hats, notebooks)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Exploring unique items: bento boxes, high-quality backpacks, polarized sunglasses](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Considering using a Cricut machine for custom branding on various items](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Investigating options for embroidery/stamping on trendy clothing (e.g., Arc'teryx, Cotopaxi)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

### Workshop Promotion Strategies

  - [Current performance: 500 visits to 200+ registrants (in line with previous ratios)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Planned actions:](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Newsletter blast (with tracking)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Influencer post](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Considering LinkedIn InMail campaign](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [Using Dig for personalized outreach (50 messages/day max)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Discussing potential for YouTube ads to promote workshop video content](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Events/Community Manager Profile

  - [Ideal candidate combines strategic thinking, hands-on skills, networking ability, and community-building passion](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Considering non-traditional backgrounds (e.g., hospitality, nonprofits, arts, music)](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Emphasis on relationship-building and genuine interest in connecting people](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Example of successful hire: hospitality background transitioned to tech events](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Podcast Guest Planning

  - [Upcoming slots in the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/dvV17PQoWM7zYsxCjF7QBo6xM36P5UB-?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
